title: Applied Enterprise AI & Accountable Leadership (IS 425)
frameworks: Production AI System: Knowledge Graph + HITL + Vector Retrieval + Evaluation Harness + Observability
Evaluation Metrics: Precision, Recall, F1, Confusion Matrix, Statistical Significance, A/B Testing
AI Security: prompt injection, model extraction, adversarial inputs, data poisoning, SBOM
Accountable Leadership: stand behind your work, defend with evidence, acknowledge failures honestly
Google SRE: blameless postmortems, error budgets, SLIs/SLOs
concepts: AI cannot be sued, fired, shamed, or praised — accountability is exclusively human
'Stochastic Parrots' (Gebru): LLMs amplify biases in training data without understanding
'Gender Shades' (Buolamwini): facial recognition 0.8% error for light males, 34.7% for dark females
Hamilton invented 'software engineering' because she believed software deserves rigorous discipline
Hinton left Google in 2023 to warn about AI risks — the most profound act of accountable leadership
Wiener warned in 1950: automation without accountability concentrates power and destroys human agency
Costs of wrong AI decisions: 1000 decisions/day at 95% accuracy = 50 wrong decisions/day
The gap between 'works on my laptop' and 'works for 100 concurrent users in production' is where projects die
context: IS 425 is Studio 7 (capstone) of the BSEAI degree. Students build production-quality AI systems with knowledge graphs, human-in-the-loop workflows, vector retrieval, evaluation harnesses, and observability — for real clients with real requirements. Demo Day with industry judges. The core capability is Accountable Leadership.
